auth_note: All endpoints require authentication. Tests assume a valid JWT is provided via Authorization header. RBAC roles: VIEWER < STAFF < MANAGER < ADMIN.

endpoints.description: Get presigned S3 upload URL with MIME type and file size validation (STAFF+)

test_cases.name: Presign - file size exceeds maximum (>50MB default)
Presign - entity not found (valid type, non-existent ID)

endpoints.description: Confirm upload completion and create Attachment record (STAFF+)

test_cases.name: Confirm - happy path
test_cases.precondition: Must first call presign and upload file to S3/MinIO

db_verification.query: SELECT id, entity_type, entity_id, file_name, file_size, mime_type, storage_key, description FROM attachments WHERE storage_key = '{{storageKey}}'
db_verification.expected: Row exists with matching entityType, entityId, fileName, fileSize, mimeType

test_cases.name: Confirm - storage key does not match tenant/entity
Confirm - object not found in S3
Confirm - file size mismatch
test_cases.precondition: Upload a file of known size, then confirm with wrong fileSize

test_cases.name: Confirm - MIME type mismatch
test_cases.precondition: Upload a PDF file, then confirm with wrong mimeType

test_cases.name: Confirm - blocked MIME type on confirm (defense-in-depth)

endpoints.description: List attachments for a specific entity with pagination (VIEWER+)

test_cases.name: List attachments - happy path with results
test_cases.precondition: Entity has at least one attachment

test_cases.name: List attachments - empty list for entity with no attachments
List attachments - pagination with limit and offset
List attachments - missing entityType query param

endpoints.description: Get presigned download URL for an attachment (VIEWER+)

test_cases.name: Download - happy path
test_cases.precondition: Attachment exists in DB and S3

endpoints.description: Delete attachment (DB record + S3 object). Requires MANAGER+

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attachments WHERE id = '{{attachment_to_delete_id}}'

test_cases.name: Delete attachment - STAFF role denied (requires MANAGER+)

endpoints.description: Create a note on any business record (STAFF+). SYSTEM noteType rejected via API.

body.content: This is a test note for the customer record.

db_verification.query: SELECT id, entity_type, entity_id, note_type, content, created_by FROM notes WHERE entity_type = 'Customer' AND entity_id = '{{existing_vatcode_id}}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
db_verification.expected: Row exists with note_type=GENERAL, content matches, created_by matches staff userId

body.content: Internal note: pricing approved by manager.

db_verification.query: SELECT note_type FROM notes WHERE id = '{{response.id}}'

body.content: Dear customer, your order has been shipped.

db_verification.query: SELECT note_type FROM notes WHERE id = '{{response.id}}'

test_cases.name: Create note - default noteType is GENERAL when omitted
Create note - with optional title and classification
Create note - SYSTEM noteType rejected via API

body.content: Trying to create a system note via API.

test_cases.name: Create note - content with dangerous HTML (XSS prevention)

endpoints.description: List notes for an entity, ordered by pinned first then newest. Supports noteType filter. (VIEWER+)

test_cases.name: List notes - pinned notes appear first
test_cases.precondition: Entity has both pinned and unpinned notes

expected.body_assertion: First item in items array has isPinned=true
items array length <= 2, total reflects all matching notes

test_cases.name: List notes - soft-deleted notes excluded
test_cases.precondition: Entity has one active note and one soft-deleted note

expected.body_assertion: Soft-deleted notes not in items array

endpoints.description: Update note content/title/classification. Own notes only (MANAGER+ can edit others). SYSTEM notes read-only. (STAFF+)

test_cases.name: Update note - happy path (own note, update content)

db_verification.query: SELECT content, updated_by FROM notes WHERE id = '{{own_note_id}}'
db_verification.expected: content = 'Updated note content.', updated_by = staff userId

test_cases.name: Update note - happy path (update title only)
Update note - SYSTEM note is read-only

body.content: Trying to edit someone else's note.

test_cases.name: Update note - MANAGER can edit other user's note
Update note - empty body (no fields provided)

endpoints.description: Soft-delete a note (sets deletedAt). SYSTEM notes cannot be deleted. (MANAGER+)

db_verification.query: SELECT deleted_at, updated_by FROM notes WHERE id = '{{note_to_delete_id}}'
db_verification.expected: deleted_at IS NOT NULL, updated_by = manager userId

test_cases.name: Delete note - SYSTEM note cannot be deleted
Delete note - STAFF role denied (requires MANAGER+)
Delete note - already soft-deleted note returns 404
Pin note - happy path (pin unpinned note)

db_verification.query: SELECT is_pinned FROM notes WHERE id = '{{unpinned_note_id}}'

test_cases.name: Pin note - happy path (unpin pinned note)

db_verification.query: SELECT is_pinned FROM notes WHERE id = '{{pinned_note_id}}'

endpoints.description: Create a manual record link between two entities (STAFF+). Validates both entities exist, rejects self-links and duplicates.

db_verification.query: SELECT id, source_entity_type, source_entity_id, target_entity_type, target_entity_id, link_type, is_system_generated, created_by FROM record_links WHERE id = '{{response.id}}'
db_verification.expected: Row exists, is_system_generated=false, link_type=RELATES_TO, created_by=staff userId

db_verification.query: SELECT link_type FROM record_links WHERE id = '{{response.id}}'

test_cases.name: Create record link - duplicate link rejected (409)
Create record link - reverse RELATES_TO duplicate rejected (409)
test_cases.precondition: A RELATES_TO link from A->B already exists, now try B->A

test_cases.name: Create record link - invalid source entity type
Create record link - source entity not found
Create record link - missing required fields

endpoints.description: List record links for an entity. Bidirectional query (entity as source or target). Supports direction and linkType filters. (VIEWER+)

test_cases.name: List record links - happy path (direction=all)
test_cases.precondition: Entity has outgoing and incoming links

test_cases.name: List record links - filter by linkType

endpoints.description: Delete a record link. Manual links: STAFF+. System-generated links: MANAGER+. Returns 204 No Content.

test_cases.name: Delete record link - happy path (manual link, STAFF)

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM record_links WHERE id = '{{manual_link_id}}'

test_cases.name: Delete record link - system link with MANAGER (allowed)

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM record_links WHERE id = '{{system_link_id}}'

test_cases.name: Delete record link - system link with STAFF denied
Delete record link - invalid ID format

seed_entities: At least 2 Customer records in the test company
At least 1 SalesOrder record in the test company
At least 1 CustomerInvoice record in the test company
auth_tokens: viewer_token: JWT for user with VIEWER role
staff_token: JWT for user with STAFF role
manager_token: JWT for user with MANAGER role
test_data_requirements.s3_minio: MinIO must be running locally (docker-compose.yml) for presign/confirm tests
test_data_requirements.cleanup: Tests should clean up created attachments, notes, and record links after each test run
